title: EscrowCreateRequest
description: Parameters for the ccap/escrow/create method. Creates a pre-work escrow that locks the buyer's funds before the seller begins work. The seller can verify the escrow is funded before committing effort; funds release on completion or return on timeout.

idempotency_key.description: UUID v4 deduplication key. Identical requests with the same key within 24 hours return the cached result without creating a duplicate escrow.

amount.description: Amount to lock in escrow. Must be positive. The buyer's wallet must hold at least this amount at funding time.

currency.description: Currency in which the escrow is denominated.

beneficiary_agent_id.description: CCAP agent ID of the seller (the party who will receive funds on successful release).

completion_criteria.description: Human-readable description of what must happen for the escrow to be releasable. Should be precise enough to serve as a basis for dispute adjudication.
examples: Contract review report delivered to buyer_inbox within 24 hours of escrow creation

timeout_seconds.description: Number of seconds from creation until the escrow expires automatically and funds are returned to the buyer. Minimum 300 seconds (5 minutes); maximum 2592000 seconds (30 days).

dispute_resolution_method.description: The mechanism used to resolve disputes if either party calls ccap/escrow/dispute.

arbitration_agent_id.description: CCAP agent ID of the designated arbitrator. Required when dispute_resolution_method is 'arbitration_agent'.

multi_sig_threshold.description: Signature threshold configuration. Required when dispute_resolution_method is 'multi_sig'.

required_signers.description: Minimum number of signers required for a decision.

signer_agent_ids.description: CCAP agent IDs of the designated signers.

automatic_criteria.description: Machine-verifiable release criteria. Only applicable when dispute_resolution_method is 'automatic'.

check_type.description: The type of automated check to perform.

check_url.description: URL to check (for http_200 and webhook_confirmation types).

check_timeout_seconds.description: How long to wait for the automated check before treating it as failed.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for the buyer's internal tracking. Not displayed to the seller.

examples.completion_criteria: Contract review report delivered to buyer_inbox within 24 hours of escrow creation
